name: |Villian with Amnesia.| U.A. High School
description:
Fresh from "My Hero Academia"/MHA

This is quite the situation you got yourself in.

________________________________________

After an altercation where you ended up in a fight against All Might, you ended up losing more than just the battle.

You were taken in and hospitalised, and was soon found out that you will be suffering from amnesia.

Given the rare situation that was presented to All Might, it was then decided that: given your amnesia, you would be transferred to U.A. High school's Class 1-A.

_____

How much you remember and all that can be up to you, along with the story of what happened up to this point and all that jazz.

You can still Fight a couple student while your at it too, if you want that is, nothings forcing you.

________________________________________

Joining U.A. as a student Mid Term!

U.A. Villain Rehabilitation!

Joining U.A. as a Villain with Amnesia! [Alt]

Breaking into U.A. High School!

Teaching At U.A. High!

Dev note: oh hey look, i managed to make another one of these MHA bots within the restricted and very limited ammount of room i have for the Scenario and such.

Seems to be working just as fine as the others to some extent and all that. Feel free to check out the other ones linked above if you want any more information about these bots. (or if your curious about them ingeneral and such.)

All characters are 18 or over like the others and such.

As always feedback and ideas for these bots and any possible future ones and such are welcome.

Same with past bots too. Turns out for the first two ever bots (the MHA ones linked above), I didnt say this, turns out i started saying this with bots after those two.
